texto: The world has a fast-growing problematic disability, which forges bonds in families, causes people to communicate in direct and clear ways, cuts down meaningless social interaction, pushes people to the limit with learning about themselves, whilst making them work together to make a better world. It’s called Autism – and I can’t see anything wrong with it, can you? Boy I’m glad I also have this disability!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Patrick Jasper Lee que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “The world has a fast-growing problematic disability, which forges bonds in families, causes peopl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, autism, communication, com foco em trabalho e communication.
